registration.proposal: idea-engine control/outbox.md ## PROPOSAL 053 · 2026-07-14T01:15:36Z · status: sim-ready (landed via idea-engine PR #379 -> main 39e35ec7a0021f50e9640a09c8b7dd39df4fe793)
registration.harvest_source: menno420/websites @ 3076e9d1a092b81fd88a982405cb70af483f3931 — .github/workflows/healthcheck.yml line 22 cron "17 */6 * * *"; delay-or-drop caveat lines 17-18; docs/ideas/backlog.md line 890 "up to 6 hours"; founding doc in-window miss lines 22-25 (citation only — this sim is fully hermetic, zero repo/network reads)

model.time_unit: integer minutes; all probabilities exact fractions on equiprobable integer lattices
model.fires: scheduled at s_k = k*T, k = 0, 1, 2, ...; the wall-clock minute-17 phase is a fixed offset that cancels under the uniform onset phase
model.delivery_independence: drops and delays independent across fires and of everything else; conditional on phi the per-fire failure events are independent so P(miss|phi) is an exact product
model.onset_phase: phi ~ uniform integer {0..T-1}; transient outage occupies [phi, phi+D)
model.transient_detection: DETECTED iff some non-dropped fire executes at t = s_k + d_k with phi <= t < phi+D
model.persistent_latency: L = earliest successful execution at/after onset minus onset; WINDOW(T) = P(L > 360)

decision_rule.decision_arm: Arm A exact Fractions ONLY, at the shipped cell T = 360 under headline pins q = 1/20, d ~ {0..30}
decision_rule.invalid: seed-20261350 zero-noise identities failing in either arm; OR a monotonicity theorem failing (DET(T,D) non-decreasing in D at fixed T; DET_mix(T) non-increasing in T; WINDOW(T) non-decreasing in q under common random numbers); OR the Arm-B agreement gate breaching on any cell — report, no ruling
decision_rule.approve: DET_mix(360) >= 3/4 AND WINDOW(360) <= 1/100 AND the seed-20261352 stability leg reproduces the ruling through twin independently-written decision evaluators
null_axes: band-straddle: DET_mix(360) in [1/2, 3/4) and/or WINDOW(360) in (1/100, 1/20]
sensitivity straddle: a reporting-only world lands a primary conjunct across a band edge (named, never ruling)

agreement_gate.scope: every reported cell, both metric families: all 25 DET(T,D) cells, all 5 DET_mix(T), all 5 WINDOW(T); any breach is a control failure (INVALID), never overridden

arms.arm_A: DECISION (seedless, exact): full lattice enumeration, per (T, D) and per phi the exact product over the finitely many fires whose delayed execution could intersect the window; every probability an exact Fraction; byte-identical across process runs; no seed read; the ruling rides Arm A alone
arms.arm_B: VALIDATION (seeded MC): N = 200,000 scenario draws (phi, per-fire drops, per-fire delays), pinned draw order, COMMON RANDOM NUMBERS across all five T cells (one scenario set, five evaluations)

seeds.20261349: Arm B headline: N = 200,000 common-random-numbers validation run across the full T grid, both metric families
seeds.20261350: Arm B control: zero-noise identity world (q = 0, d == 0); exact identities in both arms
seeds.20261351: Arm B sensitivity confirmations: MC re-runs of the reporting-only sensitivity worlds, N = 20,000 each; reporting-only, can never flip the decision
seeds.20261352: stability leg: re-run the headline at N = 20,000; PASS iff the ruling class reproduces through twin independently-written decision evaluators

zero_noise_identities.MISS_T_D: (T-D)/T for D <= T, and 0 for D >= T

registered_EL_sanity_row: (T+1)/2 (zero-noise closed form as registered in the PROPOSAL 053 done-when; the runner re-derives E[L] from the pinned model itself and reports agreement or the exact derived form — E[L] is reporting-only and is NOT in the registered INVALID gate list)

drafter_reference_never_gated.note: compared, reported first-class, never gated; the sim re-derives everything from the pinned constants and must not trust these

fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.K_coverage_assertion: K*T > (T-1) + 360 for every grid T (asserted in-sim): no fire beyond index K-1 can execute inside any transient window (D <= 360) or the persistent 360-minute window, for any delay support in this registration
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.scenario_draw_order: per scenario: u_phi, then for k = 0..K-1 the pair (u_drop_k, u_delay_k) — exactly 1 + 2*K = 19 rng.random() calls per scenario; one scenario set is evaluated at all five T cells (common random numbers)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.phi_map: phi = int(u_phi * T) per T cell
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.drop_map: fire k dropped iff u_drop_k < q (thresholding the SHARED u_drop draws yields guaranteed per-scenario monotonicity of detection in q — the CRN form of the registered q-monotonicity theorem)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.mc_statistic: per scenario per T: L_min = min{e_k - phi : e_k = k*T + d_k >= phi, fire k not dropped, k < K}; transient (T,D) detected iff L_min < D; persistent window violated iff L_min > 360 (L_min = +inf when no in-horizon success)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.se_convention: SE = sqrt(Var_exact / N) with Var_exact from Arm A exact values: p*(1-p) for Bernoulli cells (each DET(T,D) and WINDOW(T)); for DET_mix(T) the exact pmf variance of the per-scenario statistic X = #{D in grid : D > L_min}/5 (X is a deterministic function of L_min, whose exact distribution Arm A enumerates); the sqrt and the 4*SE comparison are float by disclosure, on gates whose absolute half (<= 1/100) is exact
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.control_leg: N = 20,000 (the V060 precedent: the registration pins the world, not the control N); zero-noise world drawn with the SAME 19-draw scenario shape (q = 0 makes every drop threshold false; W = 0 makes every delay 0) so the draw sentinel is uniform; per-draw EXACT indicator identities asserted on every scenario x T x D (detected == [D >= T or phi == 0 or phi > T-D]) and on L (L == 0 if phi == 0 else T-phi), plus the estimate-level agreement gate against the exact identities
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.sensitivity_world_order: seed 20261351, one RNG, pinned order: (1) q-sweep world at W = 30 — ONE set of N = 20,000 scenarios evaluated at q in {0, 1/20, 1/10} by thresholding the shared u_drop draws (common random numbers; per-scenario monotonicity in q asserted); (2) W = 0 world at q = 1/20, N = 20,000; (3) W = 60 world at q = 1/20, N = 20,000; short-/long-heavy mixes are exact reweightings of the per-D columns in every world (exact + MC)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.EL_method: exact first-catch decomposition with closed geometric tail (executions are strictly ordered for W < T, so at most one partial fire precedes the first fully-eligible fire): E[L|phi] = p_part*E[lat_part] + (1-p_part)*((k1*T - phi + W/2) + T*q/(1-q)); computed per T x q in {0, 1/20, 1/10} at W = 30 plus the zero-noise row (q = 0, W = 0); not computed for the W = 60 world (ordering premise does not cover W >= T at T = 60; E[L] is registered per T x q)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.shipped_cell_brute_force: independent second structure for EVERY decisive number: at T = 360 only fires k = 0, 1 can intersect any registered window, so the full per-fire outcome space ({DROP} + {d = 0..30})^2 = 1024 outcomes is exhaustively enumerated per phi with exact integer weights (31 for DROP, 19 per delay value, denominator 620^2) and must equal the product-form Arm A value on every DET(360, D) cell and WINDOW(360)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.per_phi_table: the full per-phi conditional DET(360, D | phi) (360 x 5, exact fractions) is emitted in results.json
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.stability_replication: stability-leg estimates converted to exact count/N fractions and passed through BOTH twin evaluators with the registered rule order; PASS iff the class equals the Arm A class
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.twin_evaluators: evaluator 1: Fraction comparisons; evaluator 2: pure integer cross-multiplication on (num, den) pairs, independently coded, no Fraction import
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.determinism: no wall-clock in any output; stdout + results.json byte-identical across two full process runs, verified by EXTERNAL sha256
